abstract: Classifies development task complexity (LIGHT/MEDIUM/HEAVY) and suggests cost-efficient AI models per provider. Supports 10 providers: Claude (Anthropic), Gemini (Google), GPT (OpenAI), Grok (xAI), DeepSeek, Kimi (Moonshot), Qwen (Alibaba), Llama (Meta), Mistral, and GLM (Z.ai). Auto-detects MCP client environment for tailored suggestions. Works as both a behavioral skill and an MCP server. Supports live data via Artificial Analysis API.
